option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>4.1.0</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>com.pm</groupId> <artifactId>billing-service</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>billing-service</name> <description>billing-service</description> <url/> <licenses> <license/> </licenses> <developers> <developer/> </developers> <scm> <connection/> <developerConnection/> <tag/> <url/> </scm> <properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <grpc.version>1.69.0</grpc.version> <protobuf.version>4.29.1</protobuf.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webmvc</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<!--GRPC --> <dependency> <groupId>io.grpc</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-netty-shaded</artifactId> <version>1.69.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.grpc</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-protobuf</artifactId> <version>1.69.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.grpc</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-stub</artifactId> <version>1.69.0</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <!-- necessary for Java 9+ --> <groupId>org.apache.tomcat</groupId> <artifactId>annotations-api</artifactId> <version>6.0.53</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>net.devh</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>3.1.0.RELEASE</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.google.protobuf</groupId> <artifactId>protobuf-java</artifactId> <version>4.29.1</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
<build> <extensions> <!-- Ensure OS compatibility for protoc --> <extension> <groupId>kr.motd.maven</groupId> <artifactId>os-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>1.7.0</version> </extension> </extensions> <plugins> <!-- Spring boot / maven --> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin>
<!-- PROTO --> <plugin> <groupId>org.xolstice.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>protobuf-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>0.6.1</version> <configuration> <protocArtifact>com.google.protobuf:protoc:3.25.5:exe:${os.detected.classifier}</protocArtifact> <pluginId>grpc-java</pluginId> <pluginArtifact>io.grpc:protoc-gen-grpc-java:1.68.1:exe:${os.detected.classifier}</pluginArtifact> </configuration> <executions> <execution> <goals> <goal>compile</goal> <goal>compile-custom</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>4.1.0</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>com.pm</groupId> <artifactId>billing-service</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>billing-service</name> <description>billing-service</description> <url/> <licenses> <license/> </licenses> <developers> <developer/> </developers> <scm> <connection/> <developerConnection/> <tag/> <url/> </scm> <properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <grpc.version>1.69.0</grpc.version> <protobuf.version>4.29.1</protobuf.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webmvc</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency>
<!--GRPC --> <dependency> <groupId>io.grpc</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-netty-shaded</artifactId> <version>${grpc.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.grpc</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-protobuf</artifactId> <version>${grpc.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.grpc</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-stub</artifactId> <version>${grpc.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <!-- necessary for Java 9+ --> <groupId>org.apache.tomcat</groupId> <artifactId>annotations-api</artifactId> <version>6.0.53</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>net.devh</groupId> <artifactId>grpc-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>3.1.0.RELEASE</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.google.protobuf</groupId> <artifactId>protobuf-java</artifactId> <version>4.29.1</version> </dependency>
</dependencies>
<build> <extensions> <!-- Ensure OS compatibility for protoc --> <extension> <groupId>kr.motd.maven</groupId> <artifactId>os-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>1.7.0</version> </extension> </extensions> <plugins> <!-- Spring boot / maven --> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin>
<!-- PROTO --> <plugin> <groupId>org.xolstice.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>protobuf-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>0.6.1</version> <configuration> <protocArtifact>com.google.protobuf:protoc:3.25.5:exe:${os.detected.classifier}</protocArtifact> <pluginId>grpc-java</pluginId> <pluginArtifact>io.grpc:protoc-gen-grpc-java:1.68.1:exe:${os.detected.classifier}</pluginArtifact> </configuration> <executions> <execution> <goals> <goal>compile</goal> <goal>compile-custom</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project version="4"> <component name="AutoImportSettings"> <option name="autoReloadType" value="SELECTIVE" /> </component> <component name="BackgroundAgentGlobalSettings"> <option name="selectedModelId" value="auto" /> </component> <component name="ChangeListManager"> <list default="true" id="7818854b-11a4-44c7-bf05-e85d3a7b967a" name="Changes" comment="Added SpringDoc-OpenAPI"> <change beforePath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/pom.xml" beforeDir="false" afterPath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/pom.xml" afterDir="false" /> <change beforePath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/java/com/pm/patientservice/controller/PatientController.java" beforeDir="false" afterPath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/java/com/pm/patientservice/controller/PatientController.java" afterDir="false" /> <change beforePath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/java/com/pm/patientservice/dto/PatientRequestDTO.java" beforeDir="false" afterPath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/java/com/pm/patientservice/dto/PatientRequestDTO.java" afterDir="false" /> <change beforePath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/resources/application.properties" beforeDir="false" afterPath="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/resources/application.properties" afterDir="false" /> </list> <option name="SHOW_DIALOG" value="false" /> <option name="HIGHLIGHT_CONFLICTS" value="true" /> <option name="HIGHLIGHT_NON_ACTIVE_CHANGELIST" value="false" /> <option name="LAST_RESOLUTION" value="IGNORE" /> </component> <component name="CopilotPersistence"> <persistenceIdMap> <entry key="_/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management" value="3FgxM52CSfxTpiDdvfmhn1Z4W0l" /> </persistenceIdMap> </component> <component name="FileTemplateManagerImpl"> <option name="RECENT_TEMPLATES"> <list> <option value="Class" /> <option value="Exception" /> <option value="Interface" /> <option value="HTTP Request" /> </list> </option> </component> <component name="Git.Settings"> <option name="RECENT_BRANCH_BY_REPOSITORY"> <map> <entry key="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management" value="master" /> </map> </option> <option name="RECENT_GIT_ROOT_PATH" value="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management" /> </component> <component name="GitHubPullRequestSearchHistory">{ "lastFilter": { "state": "OPEN", "assignee": "matdsant" } }</component> <component name="GithubPullRequestsUISettings">{ "selectedUrlAndAccountId": { "url": "https://github.com/matdsant/patient-management.git", "accountId": "1b43a8ae-d5c8-4068-b080-b3f8ee28c1ab" } }</component> <component name="HttpClientOnboardingState">{ "isOnboardingCommentShown": true }</component> <component name="KubernetesApiPersistence">{}</component> <component name="KubernetesApiProvider">{ "isMigrated": true }</component> <component name="ProjectColorInfo">{ "associatedIndex": 8, "fromUser": false }</component> <component name="ProjectId" id="3FgxM52CSfxTpiDdvfmhn1Z4W0l" /> <component name="ProjectSessionTemplates"> <option name="inlineTemplate"> <template> <option name="modeId" value="InlineAgent" /> <option name="model"> <model> <option name="modelType" value="builtin_id" /> <option name="modelValue" value="auto" /> </model> </option> <option name="targetType" value="LOCAL" /> </template> </option> </component> <component name="ProjectViewState"> <option name="hideEmptyMiddlePackages" value="true" /> <option name="showLibraryContents" value="true" /> </component> <component name="PropertiesComponent"><![CDATA[{ "keyToString": { "Docker.patient-service-db.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.create-patient | Creates a new patient entity.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.create-patient | Test with existing email (should return error).executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.create-patient | Test without email (should return error)#2.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.create-patient | Test without email (should return error).executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.delete-patient | Delete an entity.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.get-patients | GET request to get all patients.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.update-patient | Update an existing patient entity.executor": "Run", "Maven.patient-service [clean,install].executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder0": "0", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder1": "1", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth0": "75", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth1": "75", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "Spring Boot.PatientServiceApplication.executor": "Run", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "copilot.chat.legacySessionMetadata.migrated": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/resources", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.lookFeel", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }]]></component> <component name="RecentsManager"> <key name="CopyFile.RECENT_KEYS"> <recent name="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/resources" /> <recent name="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/java/com/pm/patientservice" /> <recent name="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/src/main/java/com/pm/patientservice/controller" /> </key> <key name="MoveFile.RECENT_KEYS"> <recent name="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management" /> </key> </component> <component name="RunAnythingCache"> <option name="myCommands"> <command value="mvn clean install" /> </option> </component> <component name="RunDashboard"> <option name="configurationStatuses"> <map> <entry key="HttpClient.HttpRequestRunConfigurationType"> <value> <map> <entry key="create-patient | Test with existing email (should return error)" value="STOPPED" /> <entry key="create-patient | Test without email (should return error)" value="STOPPED" /> <entry key="create-patient | Test without email (should return error)#2" value="STOPPED" /> <entry key="delete-patient | Delete an entity" value="STOPPED" /> <entry key="update-patient | Update an existing patient entity" value="STOPPED" /> </map> </value> </entry> </map> </option> </component> <component name="RunManager" selected="Spring Boot.PatientServiceApplication"> <configuration name="create-patient | Test with existing email (should return error)" type="HttpClient.HttpRequestRunConfigurationType" factoryName="HTTP Request" temporary="true" nameIsGenerated="true" path="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/api-requests/patient-service/create-patient.http" executionIdentifier="Test with existing email (should return error)" index="2" runType="Run single request"> <method v="2" /> </configuration> <configuration name="create-patient | Test without email (should return error)#2" type="HttpClient.HttpRequestRunConfigurationType" factoryName="HTTP Request" temporary="true" nameIsGenerated="true" path="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/api-requests/patient-service/create-patient.http" executionIdentifier="Test without email (should return error)#2" index="4" runType="Run single request"> <method v="2" /> </configuration> <configuration name="delete-patient | Delete an entity" type="HttpClient.HttpRequestRunConfigurationType" factoryName="HTTP Request" temporary="true" nameIsGenerated="true" path="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/api-requests/patient-service/delete-patient.http" executionIdentifier="Delete an entity" runType="Run single request"> <method v="2" /> </configuration> <configuration name="get-patients | GET request to get all patients" type="HttpClient.HttpRequestRunConfigurationType" factoryName="HTTP Request" temporary="true" nameIsGenerated="true" path="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/api-requests/patient-service/get-patients.http" executionIdentifier="GET request to get all patients" runType="Run single request"> <method v="2" /> </configuration> <configuration name="update-patient | Update an existing patient entity" type="HttpClient.HttpRequestRunConfigurationType" factoryName="HTTP Request" temporary="true" nameIsGenerated="true" path="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Workspace/patient-management/patient-service/api-requests/patient-service/update-patient.http" executionIdentifier="Update an existing patient entity" runType="Run single request"> <method v="2" /> </configuration> <configuration name="PatientServiceApplication" type="SpringBootApplicationConfigurationType" factoryName="Spring Boot" nameIsGenerated="true"> <option name="FRAME_DEACTIVATION_UPDATE_POLICY" value="UpdateClassesAndResources" /> <module name="patient-service" /> <option name="SPRING_BOOT_MAIN_CLASS" value="com.pm.patientservice.PatientServiceApplication" /> <method v="2"> <option name="Make" enabled="true" /> </method> </configuration> <configuration name="patient-service-db" type="docker-deploy" factoryName="docker-image" server-name="Docker"> <deployment type="docker-image"> <settings> <option name="imageTag" value="postgres:latest" /> <option name="containerName" value="patient-service-db" /> <option name="envVars"> <list> <DockerEnvVarImpl> <option name="name" value="POSTGRES_USER" /> <option name="value" value="admin_user" /> </DockerEnvVarImpl> <DockerEnvVarImpl> <option name="name" value="POSTGRES_PASSWORD" /> <option name="value" value="password" /> </DockerEnvVarImpl> <DockerEnvVarImpl> <option name="name" value="POSTGRES_DB" /> <option name="value" value="db" /> </DockerEnvVarImpl> </list> </option> <option name="portBindings"> <list> <DockerPortBindingImpl> <option name="containerPort" value="5432" /> <option name="hostPort" value="5000" /> </DockerPortBindingImpl> </list> </option> <option name="commandLineOptions" value="--network internal" /> <option name="volumeBindings"> <list> <DockerVolumeBindingImpl> <option name="containerPath" value="/var/lib/postgresql/data" /> <option name="hostPath" value="/Users/matomatt/Documents/Bind Mounts/patient-service-db" /> </DockerVolumeBindingImpl> </list> </option> </settings> </deployment> <method v="2" /> </configuration> <list> <item itemvalue="Docker.patient-service-db" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.get-patients | GET request to get all patients" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.create-patient | Test with existing email (should return error)" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.create-patient | Test without email (should return error)#2" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.delete-patient | Delete an entity" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.update-patient | Update an existing patient entity" /> <item itemvalue="Spring Boot.PatientServiceApplication" /> </list> <recent_temporary> <list> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.get-patients | GET request to get all patients" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.delete-patient | Delete an entity" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.update-patient | Update an existing patient entity" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.create-patient | Test without email (should return error)#2" /> <item itemvalue="HTTP Request.create-patient | Test with existing email (should return error)" /> </list> </recent_temporary> </component> <component name="SharedIndexes"> <attachedChunks> <set> <option value="bundled-jdk-30f59d01ecdd-37e91769500f-intellij.indexing.shared.core-IU-261.26222.65" /> <option value="bundled-js-predefined-d6986cc7102b-31caf2ab9e3c-JavaScript-IU-261.26222.65" /> </set> </attachedChunks> </component> <component name="TaskManager"> <task active="true" id="Default" summary="Default task"> <changelist id="7818854b-11a4-44c7-bf05-e85d3a7b967a" name="Changes" comment="" /> <created>1782510463035</created> <option name="number" value="Default" /> <option name="presentableId" value="Default" /> <updated>1782510463035</updated> <workItem from="1782510464218" duration="6163000" /> <workItem from="1783006129485" duration="713000" /> <workItem from="1783024980819" duration="3693000" /> <workItem from="1783028703253" duration="562000" /> <workItem from="1783029296033" duration="626000" /> <workItem from="1783170996515" duration="11499000" /> <workItem from="1783191939959" duration="605000" /> <workItem from="1783195804940" duration="1010000" /> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00001" summary="Base project created"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1782512015520</created> <option name="number" value="00001" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00001" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1782512015520</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00002" summary="Patient Controller created"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1782512176118</created> <option name="number" value="00002" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00002" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1782512176118</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00003" summary="Patient Mapper value="00009" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00009" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1782513973634</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00010" summary="Added project details on README.md"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1782516445666</created> <option name="number" value="00010" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00010" /> <option summary="FIXED: PatientMapper"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1782517689001</created> <option name="number" value="00014" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00014" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1782517689001</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00015" summary="Added RequestDTO and http get test"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00016" summary="Added PatientRequestDTO"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1783026292340</created> <option name="number" value="00016" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00016" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1783026292340</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00017" summary="Added error handling"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1783171774987</created> <option name="number" value="00017" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00017" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1783171774987</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00018" summary="Added error handling to Email and Patients"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1783175478970</created> <option name="number" value="00018" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00018" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1783175478970</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00019" summary="Error handling"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1783190225609</created> <option name="number" value="00019" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00019" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1783190225609</updated> </task> <task id="LOCAL-00020" summary="Deleted unused imports"> <option name="closed" value="true" /> <created>1783190914418</created> <option name="number" value="00020" /> <option name="presentableId" value="LOCAL-00020" /> <option name="project" value="LOCAL" /> <updated>1783190914418</updated> </task> <option name="localTasksCounter" value="21" /> <servers /> </component> <component name="TypeScriptGeneratedFilesManager"> <option name="version" value="3" /> </component> <component name="VcsManagerConfiguration"> <MESSAGE value="Base project created" /> <MESSAGE value="Patient Controller created" /> <MESSAGE value="Patient Mapper created" /> <MESSAGE value="Patient Repository created" /> <MESSAGE value="Patient DTO created" /> <MESSAGE value="Patient Model created" /> <MESSAGE value="Patient Service created" /> <MESSAGE value="Added some files on .gitignore" /> <MESSAGE value="Added data.sql file to help us create new users on our database" /> <MESSAGE value="Added project details on README.md" /> <MESSAGE value="Moved README.md" /> <MESSAGE value="Update 26062026" /> <MESSAGE value="FIXED: PatientMapper" /> <MESSAGE value="Added RequestDTO and http get test" /> <MESSAGE value="Added PatientRequestDTO" /> <MESSAGE value="Added error handling" /> <MESSAGE value="Added error handling to Email and Patients" /> <MESSAGE value="Error handling" /> <MESSAGE value="Deleted unused imports" /> <option name="LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE" value="Deleted unused imports" /> </component> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project version="4"> <component name="AutoImportSettings"> <option name="autoReloadType" value="SELECTIVE" /> </component> <component
